name: Knee MRI
description: MRI of the knee for meniscus, ligament, and cartilage evaluation

findings.technique: MRI of the knee was performed with T1, T2, PD, and fat-saturated sequences in multiple planes.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Menisci
sections.content: Medial meniscus [intact / no tear]. Lateral meniscus [intact / no tear]. No degenerative changes.

sections.name: Ligaments
sections.content: ACL [intact / no tear]. PCL [intact / no tear]. MCL [intact]. LCL [intact].

sections.name: Cartilage
sections.content: Articular cartilage [is intact / no fissuring / no full-thickness defect].

sections.name: Bone
sections.content: Bone marrow [no edema / no contusion / no fracture]. No osteochondral lesions.

impression:
1. No meniscal tear.
2. No ligamentous injury.
3. Normal knee MRI.
author: RadReport Templates
